calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Petition For Approval Of Tenant Buyout Agreement; Authority To Advance Funds To The Estate And Reimbursement Without Interest; And Authority To Sell Property

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Robert Ferris, for Angela Gabourie, Petitioner.
Victor Ruiz, in propria persona, Objector.

At the outset, the court advises of its intent to appoint the Petitioner as Administrator of the Estate either with Full Authority, with bond, or Limited authority. Mr. Ruiz is allowed to object to the preceding and there is additional discussion regarding a potential bond amount. After discussion, the court confirms that it is appointing the Petitioner as Administrator with a bond of $1,000,000, over Mr. Ruiz' objections.

The matter is taken under submission to confirm the appointment of a Probate Referee and a future Status Hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Robles. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Oct-27-2025): Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. A Status Hearing is set for Apr-26-2027 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Continued To Oct-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
